prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: # Character Design Prompt

**Full-body character design of Su Li (苏黎), a young adult female protagonist, centered on pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words.**

**Facial Features & Expression:**
A strikingly beautiful young woman with delicate, refined features that convey both intellectual depth and emotional vulnerability. Pale, luminous complexion with an almost ethereal quality. Large, expressive light gray eyes (浅灰色瞳孔) that seem to hold layers of contemplation and distant wisdom, with a subtle melancholic undertone suggesting someone who perceives more than others. Soft, graceful eyebrows. Straight, elegant nose. Gently curved lips with a barely-there, enigmatic smile that hovers between serenity and quiet resignation. Her expression embodies a peaceful introspection, as if she's simultaneously present and drifting through memories.

**Hair:**
Medium-length chestnut brown hair (栗色中长发) falling just past her shoulders, with natural, flowing waves that catch light in varied tones—from warm amber to cool umber. The hair has an organic, slightly windswept quality with loose strands framing her face, creating a soft, approachable silhouette. The texture appears silky yet substantial, with impressionistic brushstrokes suggesting movement and light filtering through.

**Attire:**
Minimalist white outfit (简约白色) consisting of a flowing, asymmetrical tunic with clean architectural lines that suggest both clinical precision and artistic sensibility. The fabric appears lightweight and semi-translucent in places, with subtle layering that creates depth through varying opacity—echoing the "半透明材质" of the world's central district. Loose, elegant sleeves that taper at the wrists. Simple, streamlined white trousers with a relaxed fit. The entire ensemble has a futuristic-yet-timeless quality, devoid of excessive decoration, emphasizing purity and clarity of form.

**Physical Attributes:**
Tall, slender build with graceful proportions conveying both physical vitality and intellectual refinement. Confident yet gentle posture—standing centered with weight slightly shifted, suggesting contemplative ease rather than rigid formality. Long, elegant limbs. Her overall presence radiates exceptional charisma and beauty while maintaining an approachable, human warmth.

**Accessories & Details:**
A subtle, barely-visible neural interface device behind her left ear, rendered as a small, translucent patch that catches light like morning dew. Barefoot or wearing minimal pale footwear, emphasizing connection to immediate reality. No jewelry or ornate accessories—the design philosophy is reduction to essence.

**Artistic Style:**
Impressionist oil painting technique with visible, expressive brushstrokes. Rich interplay of light and shadow across the white clothing, creating dimension through warm highlights (cream, pale gold) and cool shadows (soft blue-gray, lavender). Atmospheric quality with slightly blurred edges that suggest memory and transience. Color palette dominated by whites, pale grays, soft chestnuts, with subtle chromatic variations creating visual poetry. The light appears to emanate from multiple soft sources, creating a dreamlike, morning-mist ambiance that aligns with the game's "淡蓝色的晨雾" aesthetic.

**Composition:**
Full-body view, character centered on pure white background, standing in a natural, contemplative pose. No environmental elements, no text, no symbols, no graphic overlays—only the character herself, allowing her presence and design to communicate the narrative essence., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

back.prompt:

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

side.prompt:
Generate a full-body, side-view portrait of character protagonist based on the provided front-view portrait, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Facing left. Standing with arms relaxed at sides.
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
